articles.title: New global LDS Primary leadership includes a historic choice: the first African president - The Salt Lake Tribune
articles.description: The LDS Church names a new trio of women to lead its worldwide Primary organization for children. An African native is the new president, the first to ever head a churchwide organization.
articles.content: (The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints) The incoming presidency of the global Primary organization includes, from left to right. Nina M. Garfield as first counselor, Rosemary K. Chibota as … [+52 chars]
